en: the Civil Code and civil rights in daily life
def_zh: 《中华人民共和国民法典》2020年5月28日通过、2021年施行——新中国第一部以“法典”命名的法律，共七编：总则、物权、合同、人格权、婚姻家庭、继承、侵权责任，被称为“社会生活的百科全书”。核心概念：民事主体（自然人—民事权利能力与行为能力、法人）；物权（所有权、用益物权、担保物权——保障各类物权）；合同（订立—要约承诺、履行—全面诚信、违约责任）；人格权独立成编（生命健康、名誉、隐私、个人信息保护）；婚姻家庭（婚姻自由、夫妻财产、离婚冷静期）；继承（法定/遗嘱）；侵权责任（过错责任为主）。解决争议途径：调解、仲裁、诉讼（民事诉讼举证“谁主张、谁举证”）。
def_en: China's Civil Code (passed 28 May 2020, in force 2021) — the PRC's first statute titled a 'code', seven books from General Provisions through Property, Contract, the pioneering standalone Personality Rights book (privacy and personal data included), Marriage and Family (with its debated divorce cooling-off period), Succession and Tort: 'an encyclopedia of social life'. The node doubles as a legal-English phrasebook: natural/legal persons, capacity, real rights, offer and acceptance, breach, fault liability, mediation-arbitration-litigation — the vocabulary in which Chinese business and daily life is now legally described.

sources.chapter: 第一单元 民事权利与义务

example: The Code's personality-rights book put China unexpectedly ahead of many jurisdictions on face-recognition and data suits — the privacy litigation wave now reported worldwide cites articles this chapter teaches.
nuance: 民法典 = the Civil Code；物权 = real rights/property rights（大陆法系术语——链 [[common-vs-civil-law]]，中国民法典属大陆法系谱系、师承德国潘德克顿体系）；人格权 = personality rights（大陆法概念，普通法无直接对应）；侵权 = tort。离婚冷静期 = the divorce cooling-off period（社会新闻高频）。“谁主张谁举证”= the burden of proof lies with the claimant。
